codeReview.summary: The commit adds canonical flow packet links to all 11 module packets (sales, factory, catalog-setup, inventory, hr, purchasing, invoice, company, admin-portal-rbac, auth, reports) in their Related Documentation sections, completing the bidirectional navigation between structural (module) and behavioral (flow) entrypoints. It also replaces the demo module's source-directory placeholder in MODULE-INVENTORY.md with an explicit no-replacement note pointing to the deprecated registry, and fixes a stale link in reports.md (docs/workflows/FLOW-INVENTORY.md → docs/flows/FLOW-INVENTORY.md). All linked target files exist. Every flow packet already contained reciprocal links back to its owning module packet(s).

issues.description: The 'Known Gaps and Incomplete Areas' section still says 'No dedicated flow packet for Reporting/Export (tracked in flow inventory as packet pending)', but the commit just added a link to docs/flows/reporting-export.md on line 308 and that file exists. This gap note is now stale and contradicts the newly added link. Should be removed in a follow-up.

summary: PASS with one non-blocking issue. The commit correctly implements bidirectional crosslinks between all 11 module packets and their canonical flow packets. The demo module source-directory placeholder was properly replaced with an explicit no-replacement note linking to the deprecated registry. A stale broken link in reports.md (docs/workflows/FLOW-INVENTORY.md) was also fixed. All link targets verified to exist. One non-blocking issue: the Known Gaps section in reports.md still claims no Reporting/Export flow packet exists, contradicting the link just added on line 308.
